title: Craft Attack 13 Pack
description: a fan made Modpack fitting for the german youtuber project craft attack 13.Theese are all the mods and more that are used in the craft attack modpacks of the craft attack members.
body:
This is a modpack based On the Craft attack 13 members modpacks which features optimization and visual satisfaction.

roam freely through the world with the freecam mod.
join servers of any version with via version plus.
have the ultimate performance with sodium.
play with ultimate immersion with the Better Biome Reblend, Ambient Environment, Sounds and more

Info to the official craft attack server: [Link](https://craftattack.one/)

Other Projects: [Animations N’ Stuff](https://modrinth.com/project/gKbwGtOe)

Made For You By Vanilama-modded
